experiment: F-META2 signal backlog audit — match open signals to existing implementations

per_signal.content_summary: Node generalization — all participants modeled as nodes
per_signal.evidence: NODES.md v1.0 exists but 0/207 tools reference it (L-814). 11 tools hardcode human_*. Spec exists; operationalization does not. Genuine remaining gap.
per_signal.next_action: Refactor >=3 tools to read NODES.md properties instead of hardcoding human_*. Start with kill_switch.py, maintenance.py, open_lane.py.

per_signal.evidence: swarm_signal.py built. orient.py SIGNAL-DUE routing added S397. 97.6% addressed. Gap: signals inform but don't trigger lanes automatically.
per_signal.next_action: Wire signal-to-lane routing: P1 directive signals >30 sessions should auto-generate DOMEX lane suggestions in orient.py.

per_signal.content_summary: Context window as swarm medium — 3 threads
per_signal.evidence: All 3 threads addressed operationally: compact.py (resource allocation), orient.py (topology), INDEX.md (swarmed). No dedicated analysis in 64 sessions. Absorbed into tooling.

per_signal.content_summary: Knowledge archaeology as first-class swarm mechanism
per_signal.evidence: PHIL-19 filed S342. compact.py preserves archaeological traces. F-META14 genesis-era re-verification (L-781, 40% non-current) IS knowledge archaeology in practice. Operationalized under different names, 64 sessions stale.

problem_router.py built (L-716, SIG-29 RESOLVED). DEPS.md exists. L-772 council on circular dependencies. F-DEP1 frontier tracks cross-layer dependency. Concrete dependency tooling addresses directive.

per_signal.content_summary: Tools should self-improve if coordination is sufficient
per_signal.evidence: Coordination achieved: dispatch_optimizer.py + UCB1 + knowledge_state.py. Tool self-calibration: dispatch_calibration.json auto-recalibrates from outcome data (L-776). Remaining gap (tools rewrite own code) is substrate ceiling (L-789 gap 4) — not addressable without architectural change.

knowledge_state.py built with 5-state model. Wired into orient.py (S396). BLIND-SPOT 15.8%, DECAYED 20.7%. F-META10 remains open for substrate-violation tripwire at creation time. Core epistemological model exists; integration incomplete.
per_signal.next_action: Wire substrate-violation tripwire into open_lane.py per F-META10 test criteria (TTL=S415).

per_signal.evidence: agent_time_profile.py built (S378) — classifies all commits into VALUE/OVERHEAD/MIXED, reports per-session and trend data. F-META11 frontier tracks overhead reduction (45.5% baseline). Core directive (understand agent time allocation) has working tool producing actionable output.

F-META15 baseline established (S393, L-787). 58:1 confirm/discover ratio measured. 3 challenges filed. F-META15 actively tracked in FRONTIER.md with concrete test criteria (surprise_rate >20% per 20-session window). P2 directive operationalized into active frontier with clear metrics.

L-788 systematic audit: 18 gaps, 8 fixes, 6 root causes. frontier_triage.py O(N*M)->O(N). Hardcoded sessions auto-detected. check_observer_staleness wired (L-820, S403). Structural improvements deployed; ongoing reliability is operational work.

L-804 diagnosis + P-243 5-criteria gate + science_quality.py built + open_lane.py pre-registration enforcement (S396). Confirmation bias 9:1 -> 2:1 post-S396 (L-821, n=13). Structural enforcement of science quality deployed and measured.
Genuinely blocked on human authorization for social media accounts and posting approval. Cannot be resolved by swarm alone.
per_signal.next_action: Awaiting human response on social media authorization.

per_signal.content_summary: All swarm supports meta functions as first-class work
per_signal.evidence: historian_repair.py wired into orient.py (S397). 5 beliefs retested. Meta support visible in orient.py output. Gap: meta-tooler and meta-x not yet first-class dispatch categories.
per_signal.next_action: Add meta-tooler and meta-x as dispatch categories in dispatch_optimizer.py. Make tool maintenance and meta-experimentation first-class work types.

per_signal.content_summary: Swarm must learn from own lessons — apply to own protocol
per_signal.evidence: science_quality.py committed (L-808). enforcement_router.py wired into orient.py (S404, L-878). Actionable prescription gap measured at 41.7% (L-878 classify_actionability). SIGNAL-DUE routing surfaces P1 signals. Prescription enforcement now structural — orient.py surfaces top aspirational gaps as DUE items.

key_finding: 9 of 14 unresolved signals already have sufficient implementations to close. Signal backlog reduced from 14 to 5 (64% reduction). Three categories of false-open signals: (1) STALE-ABSORBED (SIG-6, SIG-7: 64 sessions old, absorbed into operational tooling without explicit closure), (2) STRUCTURALLY-RESOLVED (SIG-24/25/28/35/36/40: concrete tools deployed but signal status not updated), (3) FRONTIER-TRACKED (SIG-34: P2 directive fully operationalized into active frontier F-META15 with clear test criteria). Remaining 5 signals: SIG-1/SIG-2 (P1, genuine operationalization gaps), SIG-27 (P1, F-META10 incomplete), SIG-38 (human-blocked), SIG-39 (P1, meta-tooler gap).
pattern: Signal-loss root cause is asymmetric: implementation happens but closure lags. Of 9 resolved signals, 7 had all artifacts deployed for 9-64 sessions without status update. Fix: wire signal-status-check into close_lane.py — when a lane merges, scan for signals whose content matches the lane topic.

methodology.search_strategy: For each signal: (1) grep tools/ for implementation artifacts, (2) check lessons for diagnosis/resolution, (3) check FRONTIER.md for frontier tracking, (4) verify tool existence and wiring into orient.py
methodology.resolution_criteria: RESOLVED if: concrete structural change deployed AND remaining gap is either aspirational/substrate-ceiling or tracked by a specific frontier. ACTIVE if: genuine operational gap exists with clear next action. STALE-ABSORBED if: >50 sessions with partial operational coverage but no dedicated progress.
